title: cyperus pubescens
intro: Cyperus pubescens, also known as the woolly flat sedge, is a perennial plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus pubescens include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in urinary issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the roots or rhizomes in water or a solvent like ethanol.
